content.text: What is the maximum execution timeout for an AWS Lambda function?
The maximum execution timeout for a Lambda function is 15 minutes.
What programming languages does AWS Lambda support?
Lambda supports Python, Node.js, Java, Go, .NET, and Ruby.
How many nines of durability does Amazon S3 provide?
Amazon S3 provides 99.999999999% (11 nines) of data durability.
What are the two capacity modes available in DynamoDB?
DynamoDB offers two capacity modes: on-demand and provisioned.
DynamoDB Streams captures a time-ordered sequence of item-level modifications in a DynamoDB table.
What storage classes does Amazon S3 offer?
S3 offers S3 Standard, S3 Intelligent-Tiering, S3 Standard-IA, S3 One Zone-IA, S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval, S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive.
